title: hypolytrum longifolium subsp. sylvaticum
intro: Hypolytrum longifolium subsp. sylvaticum, also known as the Woodland Hypolytrum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. This plant is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America, and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. The Woodland Hypolytrum has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in folk remedies to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation.
